project_id.description: ID of the Project containing the secret. (UUID format)

status.description:
Current status of the secret.
* `ready`: the secret can be read, modified and deleted.
* `locked`: no action can be performed on the secret. This status can only be applied and removed by Scaleway.

created_at.description: Date and time of the secret's creation. (RFC 3339 format)

updated_at.description: Last update of the secret. (RFC 3339 format)

version_count.description: Number of versions for this secret.

managed.description: Returns `true` for secrets that are managed by another product.

protected.description: Returns `true` for protected secrets that cannot be deleted.

type.description:
Type of the secret.
See the `Secret.Type` enum for a description of values.

values.certificate: List of concatenated PEM blocks. They can contain certificates, private keys or any other PEM block types.
values.key_value: Flat JSON that allows you to set as many first level keys and scalar types as values (string, numeric, boolean) as you need.
values.basic_credentials: Flat JSON that allows you to set a username and a password.
values.database_credentials: Flat JSON that allows you to set an engine, username, password, host, database name, and port.
values.ssh_key: Flat JSON that allows you to set an SSH key.

path.description:
Path of the secret.
Location of the secret in the directory structure.

ephemeral_policy.description:
Ephemeral policy of the secret.
(Optional.) Policy that defines whether/when a secret's versions expire. By default, the policy is applied to all the secret's versions.

time_to_live.description: Time frame, from one second and up to one year, during which the secret's versions are valid. (in seconds)

expires_once_accessed.description: Returns `true` if the version expires after a single user access.

action.description:
Action to perform when the version of a secret expires.
See the `EphemeralPolicy.Action` enum for a description of values.

values.delete: The version is deleted once it expires.
values.disable: The version is disabled once it expires.

used_by.description: List of Scaleway resources that can access and manage the secret.

deletion_requested_at.description: Returns the time at which deletion was requested. (RFC 3339 format)

key_id.description:
ID of the Scaleway Key Manager key.
(Optional.) The Scaleway Key Manager key ID used to encrypt and decrypt secret versions. (UUID format)
